zh.lifeSummary: 當Edith de Warenne於1076年出生在英國哈普爾馬普萊度哈姆時，她的父親William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey42歲，母親Gundred de St Omer25歲。她於1091年之前與Gérard de Gournay結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1160年在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文沃特波利霍利 藍德 武薩享年85歲，埋葬在巴勒斯坦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edith de Warenne于1076年出生在英国哈普爾馬普萊度哈姆时，她的父亲William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey42岁，母亲Gundred de St Omer25岁。她于1091年之前与Gérard de Gournay结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1160年在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文沃特波利霍利 藍德 武薩享年85岁，埋葬在巴勒斯坦。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Edith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

variants.name: Edythe
meanings: From an Old English female personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + gӯð ‘strife’. This was borne by a daughter ( 961–984 ) of Edgar the Peaceful. (She was named in accordance with the common Old English practice of repeating name elements within a family.) She spent her short life in a convent, and is regarded as a saint.

historicEvents.title: Domesday Book
historicEvents.description: Domesday Book is Britain's earliest extant public record with information containing land surveys and landholdings commissioned by William I. The book was completed in 1086.

historicEvents.title: The Crusades
historicEvents.description: A series of religious wars between Christians and Muslims, known as the Crusades, occurred between 1096 and 1291, and played a large role in European Christian dominance in the Middle East.

historicEvents.title: The Battle of Tichebray
historicEvents.description: King Henry I defeated and captured his brother, Robert of Normandy, at the Battle of Tinchebray in 1106. Robert remained in captivity until his death in 1134.

en.lifeSummary: When Edith de Warenne was born in 1076, in Mapledurham, Hampshire, England, her father, William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey, was 42 and her mother, Gundred de St Omer, was 25. She married Gérard de Gournay before 1091. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died about 1160, in Holy Land USA, Waterbury, New Haven, Connecticut, United States, at the age of 85, and was buried in Palestine.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edith de Warenne est née en 1076, à Mapledurham, Hampshire, Angleterre, son père, William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Gundred de St Omer, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Gérard de Gournay avant 1091. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée environ 1160, à Holy Land USA, Waterbury, New Haven, Connecticut, États-Unis, à l’âge de 85 ans, et a été enterrée à Palestine.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edith de Warenne 1076 in Mapledurham, Hampshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey 42 und ihre Mutter Gundred de St Omer 25. Sie hat vor 1091 Gérard de Gournay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1160 im Alter von 85 Jahren in Holy Land USA, Waterbury, New Haven, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Palästina begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edith de Warenne è nata il nel 1076 nel Mapledurham, Hampshire, England, sua padre, William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Gundred de St Omer, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato Gérard de Gournay prima del 1091. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1160, nel Holy Land USA, Waterbury, New Haven, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 85 anni, e fu sepolta a Palestina.

ja.lifeSummary: Edith de Warenneが1076年にイギリスハンプシュアイアマプレドウルハムで生まれた時，父William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surreyは42歳，母Gundred de St Omerは25歳であった。1091年以前にGérard de Gournayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1160年にアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンワテルブリーホーリー ランド ウサで85歳で死去し，パレスチナにて埋葬された。

ko.The Holy Land: 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 왓르버이 홀이 랜드 사
ko.lifeSummary: Edith de Warenne(이)가 1076년 영국 함프실르 마플레더람에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gundred de St Omer(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1091년 이전 Gérard de Gournay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1160년 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 왓르버이 홀이 랜드 사에서 85세의 나이로 사망했으며 팔레스타인에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edith de Warenne nasceu em 1076, em Mapledurham, Hampshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Gundred de St Omer, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Gérard de Gournay antes 1091. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1160, em Holy Land USA, Waterbury, New Haven, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América, com 85 anos, e foi sepultada em Palestina.

ru.The Holy Land: холи ланд уса, вэитирбури, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edith de Warenne родилась в 1076 г. в местности мапледурам, хампшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William de Warenne 1st Earl of Surrey было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Gundred de St Omer, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gérard de Gournay перед 1091 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла около 1160 г. в местности холи ланд уса, вэитирбури, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 85 лет и была похоронена в местности Палестина.
